cards.name: 9 of Cups
cards.interpretation: wishes coming true, contentment, satisfaction, success, achievements, recognition, pleasure

cards.name: King of Swords
cards.interpretation: reason, authority, discipline, integrity, morality, serious, high standards, strict

cards.name: Page of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: foolish, immature, irresponsible, lazy, underachiever, procrastinator, missed chances, poor prospects
